# El Centro Apartments & Bungalows building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: el-centro-apartments-and-bungalows-6200-hollywood-blvd
- Address: 6200 Hollywood Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Primary URL: https://www.elcentrohollywood.com/
- Management company: APT Residential
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: medium
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site continues to market active leasing for the community in Hollywood. Source: El Centro official site (https://www.elcentrohollywood.com/). Note: Official materials continue to advertise leasing and location advantages in Hollywood.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows a 507-unit 2018 project with 12-24 month leases, active leasing, and a large shared amenity base. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/el-centro-apartments-and-bungalows-hollywood-ca/m5m52rl/). Note: Current listing shows a 507-unit, six-story building with active leasing and multiple lease options.
- [review] Birdeye shows a substantial body of public resident reviews for the property. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/el-centro-apartments-bungalows-166314006829894). Note: Birdeye showed 183 customer reviews in the public profile.

## Open questions
- Confirm cat policy, EV charging, package handling, and the full monthly parking or amenity fee stack.

## Notes
Research complete. El Centro is viable on paper and has meaningful public review depth, but it still needs fee-stack, cat-policy, and package-handling clarification before it should move into the active tour group.
